app.name: HPU Admission
app.tagline: All colleges affiliated to Himachal Pradesh University in one place.

landing.heading: One admission, every government college in Himachal.
landing.subheading: Apply once. Track across colleges. Get seats faster.

splash.title: HPU Admission
splash.subtitle: A SwiftChat mini app for Himachal Pradesh University admissions

home.welcomeBody: Check your eligibility, apply to the courses that fit, and track your admission in one place.

allotment.waitingBody: Merit has not been published for this course yet. We'll update you as soon as the state releases the list.
allotment.heroBody: You have been offered a seat in {course} at {college}.
allotment.feeBreakupHint: Government-decided fee for this course. All fee heads are listed in your fee slip after payment.
allotment.deadlineBody: Please choose within the deadline. No response means the seat is offered to the next student.
allotment.chooseHelp: You can still change to Freeze or Float before the deadline.
allotment.freezeHelp: Accept this seat and pay the fee. You won't be considered for other preferences.
allotment.floatHelp: Hold this seat. If a higher preference opens up in the next round, you'll be moved up.
allotment.declineHelp: Release this seat. You won't be considered for further rounds.
allotment.declineConfirmBody: You will lose the seat at {college} and won't be considered in later rounds. This cannot be undone.
allotment.toastFloat: Seat held. You'll be moved up if a higher preference opens.
allotment.statusFloat: You chose Float. We'll try for a higher preference in the next round.
allotment.statusFrozen: Seat frozen. Please pay the admission fee to confirm.

payment.confirmBody: Review the fee breakup. Once paid, your admission is provisional until you submit original documents at the college.
payment.successBody: Your admission at {college} is confirmed. Your roll number is ready.
payment.nextStepsBody: Please visit the college within 7 days with your original documents for final verification. Carry a printed copy of your admission letter.

portal.loginHint: For college and state admin users.

merit.lead: Publish course-wise merit once scrutiny is complete. Verified applications are ranked by best-of-five; ties broken by older date of birth.
merit.roleGate: Merit publishing is restricted to State Admin. Switch roles to continue.
merit.noVerified: No verified applications yet. Complete scrutiny first.
merit.previewNote: Preview only — ranks are finalised on publish. Re-publishing creates a new version and logs to audit.

allocation.lead: Run allocation rounds. The engine walks the merit list, matches each student to their highest-ranked preference with a vacant seat, and writes offers. Students accept with Freeze, Float, or Decline on their dashboard.
allocation.roleGate: Seat allocation is restricted to State Admin. Switch roles to continue.
allocation.meritRequired: Publish merit before running allocation for this course.

error.invalidMobile: Mobile must be 10 digits, starting with 6-9.
error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
error.invalidEmailOrMobile: Enter a valid email or 10-digit mobile number.
error.invalidAccountNumeric: Account number can only contain digits.
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.mustAcceptDeclaration: Please accept the declaration to continue.
error.fixBeforeContinue: Please fix the highlighted fields before continuing.

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this later from the top of any screen.

home.heading: Every Himachal Pradesh University college, one admission.
home.body: Register once, see the courses you're eligible for, and follow every step of your admission from any device.
home.assistedMode: Applying with help from family or at a cyber café? Use your own email and mobile — every update goes to you.
home.trustLine: A Government of Himachal Pradesh service

register.title: Create your HPU Admission account
register.subtitle: One account covers every college affiliated to Himachal Pradesh University.
register.declaration: I confirm the details I have entered are my own. I will use my own email and mobile, and I understand that if this information is wrong my application may be cancelled.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to continue your application.
login.otpHelper: We'll send a one-time code to your mobile.

otp.intro: Get a one-time code on the email or mobile number you registered with.
otp.identifierHelper: Enter the email or 10-digit mobile number you used at registration.
otp.notFound: We couldn't find an account with these details. Check and try again.
otp.sentToEmail: Code sent to {identifier}. It is valid for 10 minutes.
otp.sentToMobile: Code sent to {identifier}. It is valid for 10 minutes.
otp.codeHelper: Enter the numeric code you received.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email or mobile you registered with. We'll send you a reset link.
forgot.confirmation: If the account exists, a reset link will arrive within a minute.

dashboard.subGreeting: Here's where your admission stands today.
dashboard.nextActionBody: Finish your profile in {n} more steps. Then you can upload documents and apply.

underReview.title: Your application is with the college
underReview.body: They'll check your details and documents. We'll send you an update on mobile and here.

meritPublished.title: Merit list is out
meritPublished.body: Your name appears on the merit list. Seat allocation runs next — we'll notify you the moment your seat is offered.

seatOffered.title: 🎉 Seat offered at {college}
seatOffered.body: You have been offered a seat. Choose Freeze, Float, or Decline before the deadline.

admissionConfirmed.title: 🎓 Admission confirmed
admissionConfirmed.body: Welcome to {college}. Your roll number and admission letter are ready to download.

findCourses.title: Find courses that fit you
findCourses.body: Your profile is ready. Pick eligible courses and submit your first application.

allDone.title: You're all set
allDone.body: Track any updates right here. We'll tell you if anything changes.

mockNotifications.welcome: Welcome to HPU Admission. Finish your profile to apply.
mockNotifications.language: Tip: switch language any time from the top of the screen.

step1.title: Personal information
step1.subtitle: This is you — make sure the details match your marksheet and Aadhaar.

step2.title: Where you live
step2.subtitle: Where should we send letters? Your district decides your domicile quota.

step3.title: Your Class 12 details
step3.subtitle: We'll use this to check eligibility and build the merit list.
step3.subjectsHint: Enter at least five subjects with marks obtained and the subject's maximum marks. You can add more — we'll pick your top five automatically for the best-of-five percentage.
step3.subjectsMinFive: Enter marks for at least five subjects.
step3.bofAutoHint: Calculated from your top five subject percentages.
step3.resultFail: Below the 35% pass mark. You can't apply this cycle.

step4.title: Category and reservation claims
step4.subtitle: Select the categories you belong to. Certificate uploads appear below once you pick a claim.
step4.uploadHint: Upload a scan or use DigiLocker. Each certificate goes to its own upload screen.

step5.title: Bank details
step5.subtitle: We only use this for refunds and scholarship transfers.
step5.savedBody: Every change is saved automatically and safely stored against your HPU Admission account.
step5.warningBody: Refunds only go to this account. Do not give a cyber-café operator's or a relative's bank details — refund returns can fail.

bof.title: Best-of-Five calculator
bof.subtitle: Enter your Class 12 subject marks. We'll pick the best 5 and compute your percentage.

cgpa.title: CGPA → Percentage
cgpa.subtitle: CBSE reports CGPA. Most colleges expect a percentage — we multiply by 9.5.

calculator.placeholder: We'll plug in the interactive tool in the next sprint. For now, enter your best-of-five percentage manually on Step 3.

email.label: Email
email.helper: Use your own email, not your father's.
email.fromAccount: This is the email you registered with. Change it from Account settings.

emailOrMobile.label: Email or mobile
emailOrMobile.helper: Use the details you registered with.

fullName.label: Full name (as on marksheet)
fullName.helper: Exactly as it is printed on your Class 12 marksheet.

aadhaar.label: Aadhaar number
aadhaar.helper: 12 digits, no spaces. Optional — you can add this later.

apaar.label: APAAR ID
apaar.helper: Optional. Find your APAAR ID in DigiLocker.

category.label: Reservation category
category.helper: Pick the category you have a certificate for.

singleGirlChild.label: Are you the only daughter in your family?
singleGirlChild.helper: Single Girl Child is a supernumerary seat — an extra seat over and above the regular count.

pwd.label: Do you have a disability certificate?
pwd.helper: A PwD certificate with 40% or more disability is required.

permanentAddress.label: Permanent address
permanentAddress.helper: House number, street, village or town.

state.label: State
state.helper: Himachal Pradesh is pinned at the top.

correspondenceSame.label: Correspondence address is the same as permanent

correspondenceAddress.label: Correspondence address
correspondenceAddress.helper: Where we should send letters if it's different from your permanent address.

board.label: Board
board.helper: The board that issued your Class 12 marksheet.

yearOfPassing.label: Year of passing
yearOfPassing.helper: The year printed on your marksheet. Example: 2025.

rollNumber.label: Roll number
rollNumber.helper: Exactly as printed on your Class 12 marksheet.

stream.label: Stream
stream.helper: Cannot be changed after submission. Pick carefully.

subjects.label: Subjects in Class 12
subjects.helper: Comma-separated, exactly as printed on the marksheet.
subjects.placeholder: e.g. English, Hindi, History, Political Science, Economics

bofPercentage.label: Best-of-five percentage
bofPercentage.helper: Average of your top 5 subjects. Use the calculator if you're not sure.

gapYears.label: Gap years since Class 12
gapYears.helper: Calculated from your year of passing.
gapYears.derivedHint: Calculated from your year of passing. 0 means you are applying right after Class 12.

claims.label: Select your applicable category claims
claims.helper: Tick every category you qualify for. Please tick only those you can support with a valid certificate.

accountHolder.label: Account holder name
accountHolder.helper: Must match the name printed on the passbook.

ifsc.label: IFSC code
ifsc.helper: 11-character bank code on the passbook. Example: SBIN0001234.

certificate.willUploadLater: I don't have this right now, will upload later

checklist.title: Your documents
checklist.headline: Upload your documents
checklist.subtitle: The checklist updates with your profile. Upload once — the college will get every file automatically.
checklist.profileHint: Complete your profile first — we use it to show the right documents.
checklist.emptyPending: All required documents are uploaded. You can still add optional ones below.
checklist.emptyDone: Nothing uploaded yet. Start with your Class 12 marksheet.

upload.title: Upload {name}
upload.chooseSource: How would you like to upload?

sources.digilockerHint: Fetch an issued, verified copy from your DigiLocker account — no scanning needed.
sources.fileHint: Choose a PDF or image (PNG / JPG) from your device.

upload.invalidType: Only PDF, PNG, and JPG files are allowed. Please pick a supported file.

tips.title: How to get it right the first time
tips.clear: All details (name, marks, seal) must be crisp and readable.
tips.lighting: Take the photo in bright, even light — no shadows.
tips.align: Place the document inside the corner marks.
tips.seal: Official seal and signature should be clearly visible.
tips.size: Keep the file under {mb} MB. We compress bigger files automatically.

preview.selectedHint: You can replace this file any time before you submit.
preview.digilockerHint: This is a verified copy issued by the source authority through DigiLocker.
preview.confirmHint: You can replace this file any time before final submission.

upload.alreadyUploaded: You've already uploaded this. Replacing will send the new file for review.
upload.replaceCtaHint: Replacing resets the review status to "Under review".

digilocker.title: Pick from DigiLocker
digilocker.subtitle: DigiLocker issued documents are at par with original documents as per IT Act, 2000.
digilocker.disclaimer: Demo build — real DigiLocker connect will be enabled in production.

rejection.title: Please upload again
rejection.subtitle: The reviewer found an issue with this document. Fix it using the note below and upload a fresh copy — your earlier application data is safe.
rejection.nextStepsBody: Follow the upload tips on the next screen. Scan or re-photograph the document in good light, and check that the seal and signature are visible.

preview.title: Your upload
preview.subtitle: Here's what's with the college right now.
preview.noPreview: File preview appears here in the full build.

mock.rejectionReason: Official seal is not clearly visible. Re-upload a brighter, fuller scan of the same page.

description.aadhaar: Front side of your Aadhaar card. You can fetch it from DigiLocker in one tap.
description.marksheet_12: Both sides of your HPBOSE / CBSE / ICSE Class 12 marksheet.
description.photo: A clear passport-size colour photo with a plain background.
description.signature: Your signature on a plain white sheet, scanned or photographed.
description.character_cert: Issued by your Class 12 school principal.
description.caste_cert: Issued by the Tehsildar or SDM in HP.
description.ews_cert: Income and asset certificate in the Government of India format.
description.domicile_cert: Bona fide / Himachali certificate issued by the SDM.
description.gap_affidavit: Notarised affidavit explaining your gap year(s).
description.migration_cert: Issued by the board that gave your Class 12 marksheet.

discover.title: Find your courses
discover.subtitle: Courses you can apply for, based on the profile you've entered.
discover.searchPlaceholder: Search by college, course, or subject

filter.title: Filter results
filter.distanceHint: Approximate distance from your home district. 0 km means the college is in your own district.

sections.eligibleHint: You meet the basic rules for these.
sections.conditionalHint: You can apply, but the college will review the flagged item before admission.
sections.notEligibleHint: Your Class 12 details don't match the rules for these right now.

reason.belowMinMarks: Needs at least {min}% best-of-five. Your marks: {yours}%.
reason.failedClass12: You have marked Class 12 as failed — you can't apply this cycle.
reason.compartment: You're marked as compartment. Clear the subject and update your profile to unlock admission.
reason.gapYears: You have {n} gap year(s). Upload a notarised gap-year affidavit before scrutiny.
reason.outsideHpDomicile: Your state is outside Himachal Pradesh. HP quota seats need a domicile certificate.
reason.teacherCountReview: Seats are being reviewed against teacher strength — the college will confirm after scrutiny.
reason.profileIncomplete: Complete your Class 12 details to see accurate results.

combinationsExplainer.title: What is a BA combination?
combinationsExplainer.body: In BA you pick two main subjects from different subject buckets — for example History + Political Science, or Hindi + Economics. The seat you get depends on the combination, not just the college.

college.combinationsHint: Pick any one combination when you apply for BA.

descriptions.ba: Three-year undergraduate degree with two main subjects chosen as a combination. Best for students who studied Arts in Class 12 — BA combinations are also open to some Commerce students.
descriptions.bcom: Three-year commerce degree covering accounting, business studies, and economics. Open to Arts, Commerce, and Science streams at most colleges.
descriptions.bsc_nonmed: Three-year science degree with Physics, Chemistry, Maths. Requires PCM in Class 12.
descriptions.bsc_med: Three-year science degree with Physics, Chemistry, Biology. Requires PCB in Class 12.
descriptions.bca: Three-year degree focused on computing and software. Open to all streams with 55% minimum marks.
descriptions.bba: Three-year management-focused degree. Open to all streams with 50% minimum marks.
descriptions.bvoc: Three-year vocational degree combining classroom learning with industry skills.

course.combinationBasedNote: BA is combination-based — seats are allotted against your chosen two-subject combination.

empty.profileBody: We use your stream, marks, and domicile to show the courses you can apply for. Complete at least Step 3 of your profile.

addPreference.title: Preferences open next
addPreference.body: Once preferences unlock, you'll drag and drop combinations into the order you want them.

review.title: Review your {course} application
review.subtitle: Everything below will go to the college when you submit. Check each section and edit anything that isn't correct.
review.documentsEmpty: You haven't uploaded any required documents yet.
review.preferencesEmpty: You haven't added any preferences yet.
review.mobileOnlyContact: Registered mobile number is being used for updates

readiness.title: Ready to submit?

profile.missing: Your profile has {n} field(s) left to complete.

preferences.missing: Add at least one preference before you submit.

readiness.blockedHint: Each row links to the exact screen you need. You'll come back here once it's fixed.
readiness.allGoodHint: Read the declaration on the next screen and submit your application.
readiness.disabledHint: Please complete the missing fields above to continue.

declaration.title: Declaration and fee
declaration.subtitle: One final step before your application is sent to the college.
declaration.body: I confirm that all the information I have provided is true and correct, and that I have uploaded my own documents. I understand that if any information is found to be wrong, my application or admission may be cancelled and the fee paid may be forfeited.
declaration.consentError: Please accept the declaration to continue.
declaration.feeBody: ₹{amount} for {course}. One fee per course type.
declaration.paymentLaterNote: This is a demo build — submitting here counts as fee paid.
declaration.backHint: Need to make a change? Go back to review.

submit.title: Submitting your application
submit.body: Please don't close this screen — it will take just a moment.

submitted.title: Application submitted
submitted.subtitle: We've received your {course} application and shared it with the college.
submitted.receiptNote: Your receipt and provisional letter will be available as a PDF download in the full build.
submitted.nextStepsBody: The college will verify your documents and mark one of three outcomes — Accept, Conditional Accept, or Reject. You will get an update by SMS and inside this app.
submitted.trustTitle: Your application is safely on record
submitted.trustBody: Keep your application number handy — the college will refer to it for every update.

hub.title: Your applications
hub.subtitle: Each course type is a separate application with its own fee. Opt in to the ones you want, then pick your preferences.

empty.title: Nothing to apply for yet
empty.body: Finish your profile and check your eligibility first — we'll list your application options here.

select.title: Pick your {course} options
select.subtitle: Tap to add. You can reorder on the next screen.
select.maxReached: You've picked the maximum. Remove one to add another.
select.noneSelectedHint: Add at least one option to continue.
select.empty: No eligible options for this course right now.
select.browseDiscover: See more on the eligibility screen

rank.title: Rank your {course} preferences
rank.subtitle: Your top choice is #1. We try to give you #1 first — if it's full, we move down your list.
rank.empty: You haven't added any preferences yet. Go back and pick some.
rank.saveHint: Saved automatically as you reorder. Submission opens later.

separateApps.title: One application per course type
separateApps.body: BA, BCom and BSc each need their own application and fee. You can apply to more than one — we'll show the fee up front when you submit.

baCombinations.title: BA is combination-based
baCombinations.body: In BA you apply for a two-subject combination, not just a college. Add the combinations you want in order of preference.

maxGuidance.title: How many preferences?
maxGuidance.min: At least 1 preference is needed to continue.

fees.note: Fees are charged once per course type when you submit.

myApps.title: My applications
myApps.subtitle: Every course you've opted into. Open any to continue editing or review.
myApps.empty: You haven't started an application yet. Find eligible courses to begin.
myApps.issueCount: {n} small fix needed by the college

timeline.submitted: Submitted {ago} · The college will pick this up soon
timeline.underReview: Submitted {ago} · The college is checking your details
timeline.discrepancy: Submitted {ago} · One small fix needed from you
timeline.verified: Verified {ago} · Waiting for the merit list
timeline.conditional: Conditional {ago} · Check the note before the deadline
timeline.rejected: Rejected {ago} · Open the application to see why

banner.title: One small fix on this section
banner.actionHint: Update the fields below, then tap Mark as updated. We'll tell the college for you.
banner.reassurance: Your earlier details and fee are safe. Only this section needs a quick fix.
banner.awaitingReviewHint: The college will review your changes soon. Nothing more to do right now.

dashboard.title: One small fix on your application
dashboard.subtitle: Don't worry — your fee and earlier work are safe. Fix this and your admission keeps moving.

list.title: Items to fix
list.subtitle: The college needs a small update on your {course} application. Each link opens the right screen to fix it.
list.empty: Nothing pending right now. We'll tell you if the college needs anything more.
list.awaiting: Sent for re-check — waiting for the college.

toast.reCheckNote: Saved. We'll let you know after the college re-checks.

help.title: Help and support
help.subtitle: A few places to start. If you're still stuck, reach out — we usually reply the same day.

faqs.q1: I didn't get my OTP. What do I do?
faqs.a1: Wait one minute and tap Resend. If it still doesn't come, check that your mobile number is correct and that you have network. Some BSNL / Jio users in the hills get OTPs up to 3 minutes late.
faqs.q2: Can I change my stream after submitting?
faqs.a2: Stream cannot be changed once your application is submitted. Please double-check before you submit.
faqs.q3: The college rejected my document. What should I do?
faqs.a3: Open the issue on your dashboard, read the reason, take a clearer photo or scan, and re-upload. Your application stays in place — you don't lose your fee.
faqs.q4: I paid twice by mistake. Will I get a refund?
faqs.a4: Yes. The extra payment is auto-detected within 24 hours and refunded to the bank account on your profile. Contact the helpdesk if you don't see it after 3 working days.

help.contactBody: We answer between 10:00 AM and 6:00 PM, Monday to Saturday.

learnBeforeApplying.title: Before you register
learnBeforeApplying.heading: Learn the admission process
learnBeforeApplying.subtitle: Quick reads, no sign-up needed. Come back to register when you're ready.

dates.title: Important dates
dates.body: When registration opens, when to apply, when the merit list drops.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.body: Four steps from profile to seat allotment.

eligibilityCheck.title: Am I eligible?
eligibilityCheck.body: Answer three quick questions to see the courses open to you.

meritLookup.title: Check the merit list
meritLookup.body: Lookup by roll number — opens once the state publishes the merit list.

dates.title: Cycle 2026-27 dates
dates.subtitle: Dates are indicative and get confirmed once the Department of Higher Education publishes the official circular.
dates.footnote: Save any update that's important — we also send reminders on SMS before deadlines.

howItWorks.title: Four steps from profile to seat
howItWorks.subtitle: The whole flow fits in your phone. No paper, no visits to the college before allotment.

steps.registerBody: Email + mobile, OTP verification. One identity across every HP government college.
steps.profileBody: Five guided steps — personal, address, Class 12, claims, bank. We save as you go.
steps.pickBody: See only what you qualify for. BA is combination-based; BSc / BCom are college-based.
steps.trackBody: Rank preferences, pay the application fee, and track scrutiny right from your phone.

eligibilityCheck.title: Am I eligible?
eligibilityCheck.subtitle: Three quick questions — nothing gets saved unless you register.
eligibilityCheck.resultsEmpty: Nothing we can offer with those details. Double-check or contact the helpdesk.
eligibilityCheck.disclaimer: This is a guide only — final eligibility is confirmed by the college after you submit your application.

meritLookup.title: Check the merit list
meritLookup.subtitle: Enter your application number or Class 12 roll number. Results show once the state publishes the merit list for Cycle 2026-27.
meritLookup.notPublishedTitle: Merit list is not live yet
meritLookup.notPublishedBody: We'll open this lookup on Friday, 26 June 2026. Meanwhile, keep your application details handy.
